description: Create a billable service named 'Network Installation & Setup' with a usage unit of 'Hours', a price of '125.00', and set it to active. Then, generate a quote for 'TechNova Solutions' and contact 'David Chen' with the subject 'TechNova - Branch Network Setup' and the stage 'Created'. Ensure the billing and shipping addresses are set to '100 Innovation Way, San Jose, CA 95110'. The quote must include two line items: 2 units of the product 'Cisco Meraki MX68 Router' and 6 units of the 'Network Installation & Setup' service.
